onChange.description: Callback fired when chips change: (event: ComponentEvent<string[]>) => void

separator.description: Separator character for adding multiple chips at once

readonly.description: Whether the component is readonly (no input or removal allowed)

id.description: HTML id attribute for the container

name.description: HTML name attribute for the hidden input

args.description: Custom arguments passed to onChange callback

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the chip list and input

commitOnTab.description: Commit the current input as a chip when Tab is pressed (common tag-input UX)
